task: Launch-quality advanced task: Color Pipeline LUT Consistency Audit. Reality context: a streaming mastering team suspects inconsistent LUT application across deliverables. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=deltaE2000, metric2=luminance_nits, metric3=gamut_clip_pct, metric4=shot_priority; records: R1 deltaE2000=6.4 luminance_nits=1 gamut_clip_pct=52.6 shot_priority=722; R2 deltaE2000=7.2 luminance_nits=220 gamut_clip_pct=20.7 shot_priority=43; R3 deltaE2000=13.61 luminance_nits=18 gamut_clip_pct=1.6 shot_priority=605; R4 deltaE2000=64.6 luminance_nits=59 gamut_clip_pct=29.8 shot_priority=170; limit_deltaE2000=66.39; limit_luminance_nits=319; limit_gamut_clip_pct=80.3; decision_budget_usd=160000; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="client brief asked for a decision workbook plus concise technical memo". Rules and constraints: Compute margin = metric4 - (0.35*metric1 + 0.25*metric2 + 0.15*metric3); negative margin is fail and margin below 8% of the largest driver is warn. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: find shots requiring re-render or approval; build a reproducible workbook or script, preserve intermediate calculations, and produce an expert-review memo. Deliver lut_consistency_audit.csv + color_memo.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
